records.ety: [For older pompion, pompon, OF. pompon, L. pepo, peponis, Gr. <?/, properly, cooked by the sun, ripe, mellow; -- so called because not eaten till ripe. Cf. Cook, n.]

defs: A well-known trailing plant (Cucurbita pepo) and its fruit, -- used for cooking and for feeding stock; a pompion.
